title: Floating desert art gallery
content: Cinematic texture, high sense, golden desert in the early morning, a minimalist white art gallery building floats above the sand dunes. The building surface has delicate stone texture and soft reflection. Sunlight passes through the sand dust to form volumetric light, and the distant sand dunes are well-layered. The camera starts from the ultra-wide-angle desert panorama, slowly advances forward, passes through the flying sand grains, and enters the interior of the floating building. Inside, there are suspended sculptures, translucent silk installations, and a character in a white robe. The fabric swings naturally with the wind. The camera makes a smooth surround motion around the character, and finally the building wall slowly opens to reveal the huge sky and desert. High-end art advertising style, real light, exquisite materials, film-level composition, elegant movement, surreal but authentic.
